title: Cheesy Grits
description: Creamy, comforting stone-ground grits loaded with sharp cheddar and butter. A Southern breakfast classic.

steps.instruction: Bring broth (or water) and milk to a gentle boil in a medium saucepan.
Slowly whisk in grits to avoid clumping. Reduce heat to low.
Cook, stirring frequently, for 20–25 minutes until grits are completely soft and swollen.
Remove from heat. Stir in butter and cheese until fully melted and incorporated.
Season with salt, white pepper, and garlic powder if using.
If grits are too stiff, stir in 1–2 tbsp additional warm milk.
Serve immediately, stirring before serving to ensure no lumps remain.

notes: Cheese adds protein while improving the creamy texture. Stone-ground grits take longer to cook but have the best flavor.
